doctor.label: Doctor
doctor.description: Checks whether the connected career-ops checkout is configured correctly.
doctor.when: Run this first when setup looks broken or commands fail unexpectedly.

scan.label: Search New Jobs
scan.description: Scans configured job portals and queues matching postings in data/pipeline.md.
scan.when: Run when you want fresh jobs to grade.
scan.effect: Writes new pending pipeline entries and scan history.

grade.label: Grade Pipeline
grade.description: Grades each pending pipeline job with OpenRouter and saves evaluation reports.
grade.when: Run after fetching or queueing jobs. Use smaller batches when possible.
grade.effect: Writes reports, tracker additions, and marks processed pipeline rows.

verify.label: Verify Pipeline
verify.description: Checks tracker and pipeline integrity: statuses, reports, PDFs, duplicates, and pending merge files.
verify.when: Run after grading, merging, or hand-editing tracker data.

merge.label: Merge Tracker
merge.description: Moves generated tracker additions into data/applications.md.
merge.when: Run after Grade Pipeline creates evaluated jobs that should appear in History.
merge.effect: Updates application history and archives merged additions.

dedup.label: Deduplicate Tracker
dedup.description: Finds likely duplicate application tracker rows without changing files.
dedup.when: Run when the same company or role appears multiple times.

normalize.label: Normalize Statuses
normalize.description: Finds non-standard statuses and shows how they would be normalized.
normalize.when: Run when filters or history counts look inconsistent.

liveness.label: Check Liveness
liveness.description: Checks whether job posting URLs still appear active.
liveness.when: Run before grading a large queue to avoid wasting model calls on closed postings.
liveness.effect: Read-only URL check unless called with file-specific options outside the UI.
